description: Subquery in FROM clause (derived table) projects columns from the inner query
name: subquery_in_from
query_sql:
-- @name GetActiveUserSubquery
-- @returns :many
SELECT sub.id, sub.name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE status = 'active') sub
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
